title: Princess in the Castle
overview: In 2007, a young actress fresh from social media fame sees her life implode. Re-emerging into the public eye a decade later with a tale of captivity and murdered parents, the enigmatic Connie Castille has a story to die for.

trailers.title: Princess in the Castle (Dir: Al Carretta, 1m 30s, Trailer, 2019)
